/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/exampleProject_t.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/exampleProject_t.dir/test/example_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/exampleProject_t.dir/test/main.cpp.o -o ../../../test/exampleProject_t  -Wl,-rpath,/home/croco/mydir/packet_handler/build/TestTask/libs/PacketHandler:/home/croco/mydir/packet_handler/build/googletests/gtest libexampleProject.so ../../../googletests/gtest/libgtest.so
